transformations.name: drvAction
transformations.description: Creating/updating the columns 'customer_id, customer_name, email, city, customer_tier, updated_at, rn, hash_scd2, customer_sk, customer_id, customer_name, email, city, customer_tier, hash_scd2, effective_start_date, effective_end_date, is_current, action'

scriptLines: lkpCurrent derive(dim_action = iif(isNull(dim_customer_id), 'INSERT', iif(dim_hash_scd2 != hash_scd2, 'SCD2', 'NOCHANGE'))) ~> drvAction
